---
title: "Plot Report"
output: pdf_document
params:
  plot_title: ""
  dataset_name: ""
  variable_x: ""
  variable_y: ""
  plot_type: ""
  description_text: ""
  plot_path: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

# `r params$plot_title`

**Plot type:** `r params$plot_type`  
**Dataset:** `r params$dataset_name`  
**X variable:** `r if (nzchar(params$variable_x)) params$variable_x else "-"`  
**Y variable:** `r if (nzchar(params$variable_y)) params$variable_y else "-"`

## Description

`r params$description_text`

## Plot

```{r plot_section, eval = nzchar(params$plot_path)}
knitr::include_graphics(params$plot_path)
```
